title: Autonomous Dev Event Log Entry
description: JSON Schema for a single event line in events.jsonl, version 1. Defines the shape of every event log entry.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the event occurred.

event_type.description: The type of event. One of 25 defined event types.

request_id.description: The request ID this event belongs to.

session_id.description: The session ID that generated this event, or null for supervisor-generated events.

from_state.description: The state the request was in before this event, if applicable.

to_state.description: The state the request transitioned to, if applicable.

metadata.description: Additional event-specific metadata. Structure varies by event_type.
